title: Skill Manifest v1
description: SSOT for skill (SKILL.md) frontmatter. Mirrors Anthropic SKILL.md spec + applies_when (deterministic scheduler input) + portability + handoff + security. Refs: docs/migration/0002 §Manifest schema.

name.description: kebab-case identifier. Must equal the skill directory name.

description.$comment: P1: minLength 1 (PoC tolerant). P2~ strict via validate-skill-frontmatter.sh --strict requires >=40 chars and directive style ('Use when ...'). Passive voice discouraged.

version.description: Semantic version. Optional in P1, required at P8 (registry-ready).

applies_when.description: Deterministic scheduler input. Refs: control-plane/src/match.ts. >=1 of files_present/files_contain/language/frameworks required (enforced via anyOf).

files_present.description: Glob patterns. OR matching. Hits contribute up to 40 to score.

files_contain.description: { glob: regex }. AND matching: all entries must match. Hits contribute up to 30 to score.

language.description: Primary language match contributes 20 to score.

frameworks.description: Framework intersection ratio contributes up to 15 to score.

context_keywords.description: Weak signal. Used at runtime hook only, not in static match score.

tested_on.description: Tools the skill has been validated on (e.g. claude-code, codex, cursor).

produces.description: Artifact types this skill outputs. Vocabulary defined in .claude/agents/_handoff.yml; enforced by scripts/validate-agent-handoff.sh, not this schema.

consumes.description: Artifact types this skill expects as input. Vocabulary defined in .claude/agents/_handoff.yml.

security.description: Registry publish metadata. Optional in P1~P7, populated in P8.

signature.description: P8: sigstore cosign or SLSA provenance reference. Empty string allowed in P1~P7.
